§6Accelerator Vents§f

§aCoolant input/output ports for the accelerator multiblock.§f

The §bAccelerator Coolant Vent§f (qmd:accelerator_vent) is a port block for QMD accelerator multiblocks (Linear Accelerator, Ring Accelerator, Beam Diverter, Beam Splitter, Decelerator). It is the §eonly§f way to pipe active coolant (such as §bLiquid Helium§f) in and out of the accelerator structure.

§6Recipe Ingredients§f:
§b•§f §bStainless Steel Ingot§f (qmd)
§b•§f §bServomechanism§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bTough Alloy Ingot§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bSteel Chassis§f (nuclearcraft)

§6Key Component Materials (depth-2)§f:
§b•§f §bFerroboron Alloy Ingot§f
§b•§f §bLithium Ingot§f / §bLithium Cube§f (hbm) / §bLithium Dust§f
§b•§f §bLithium Powder§f
§b•§f §bTough Alloy Ingot§f chain (nuclearcraft)

§6Usage Context§f:
§b•§f Accelerator requires both an §aInput§f vent and a §cOutput§f vent on the long sides
§b•§f Without coolant flow, the accelerator will overheat (MAX_TEMP = §e400§f in source) and may explode
§b•§f Source: lach_01298.qmd.accelerator.tile.TileAcceleratorVent
